allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs","$env:APPDATA\\npm","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
